dialogues.npc: Look at the elephant! It's so big!

choices.text: Wow! It has big ears and a long nose!
choices.cn: 哇！它有大耳朵和长鼻子！

dialogues.npc: Look at the giraffe! It's so tall!

choices.text: Yes! It's very tall! I'm short.

dialogues.npc: Look at the monkey! It has a long tail.
dialogues.cn: 看那只猴子！它有一条长尾巴。

choices.text: And it can jump and climb!

dialogues.npc: The bear is big and fat! Look at its body.
dialogues.cn: 这头熊又大又胖！看它的身体。

dialogues.npc: Look at the bird! It's small but it can fly high.
dialogues.cn: 看那只鸟！它很小但能飞得很高。

choices.text: Amazing! I want to fly too!

dialogues.npc: Let's feed the rabbits! They are so cute.
dialogues.cn: 我们来喂兔子吧！它们好可爱。

choices.text: Yes! The rabbits are white and soft!

dialogues.npc: Look at the panda! It's black and white.
dialogues.cn: 看熊猫！它是黑白相间的。

choices.text: Pandas are so cute! I love pandas!
choices.cn: 熊猫太可爱了！我爱熊猫！

dialogues.npc: The zoo is so fun! I want to come again!
dialogues.cn: 动物园真好玩！我还想来！

choices.text: Me too! Let's come again next time!
